description: Fix missing diacritics in translated Spanish log strings and make CSS formula self-documenting
steps: In src/utils/gameLogic.ts, replace all ASCII approximations with proper Spanish diacritical characters: Estacion->Estación, Otono->Otoño, Te (tea ceremony)->Té, Politica->Política, ningun->ningún, rehen->rehén, Puntuacion->Puntuación, oposicion->oposición, Preparacion->Preparación, resolucion->resolución, colocacion->colocación, posicion->posición
In src/App.css, change .region-forces max-width from calc(5 * 24px) to calc(5 * 21px + 4 * 3px) making the formula self-documenting
acceptance_criteria: All Spanish strings in gameLogic.ts use proper diacritical marks
npx vite build succeeds without errors
